entity.summary: Algorand ecosystem DeFi protocol with swap functionality. HEI records Algofi Swap as a DEX/protocol entity because the project announced that it would sunset, making it more suitable for HEI than thin active-only DEX rows.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0054. Status is based on the public sunsetting / shutdown history rather than the DefiLlama database row alone.

events.title: Algofi announced protocol sunsetting
events.description: Algofi announced that the protocol would sunset, making Algofi Swap a dead or discontinued DEX/protocol record rather than a thin active listing.
events.notes: The exact shutdown wording/source should be strengthened later with an archived official announcement if needed.

evidence.notes: Secondary source used to support the public shutdown/sunsetting event.
